label: Exposure Attribution
description: Grouped exposure table with stacked time series chart. Breaks down gross and net exposure by factor.

0.5.note: MOCK_STRATEGIES imported from ./risk-data-context (re-export), not directly from lib/mocks.

0.7.note: empty filteredExposureRows renders no table rows; empty time series hides the chart section.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ MOCK_STRATEGIES imported from ./risk-data-context (re-export), not directly from lib/mocks. 0.6 FIXED — added isLoading spinner guard. 0.7 ✓ empty filteredExposureRows renders no table rows; empty time series hides the chart section. 0.8 FIXED — added hasError early-return block. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.1.note: data exclusively from useRiskData() — filteredExposureRows, groupedExposure, exposureTimeSeries all from context.

1.7.note: ⚠ MOCK_STRATEGIES re-exported through context from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data — these strategy archetypes are reference data and should move to lib/constants/risk. The widget uses MOCK_STRATEGIES for strategy filter dropdown labels — functional but reference data location is wrong.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data exclusively from useRiskData() — filteredExposureRows, groupedExposure, exposureTimeSeries all from context. 1.2 ✓ use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ scope.organizationIds feeds scopeStrategyIds → riskLimits filter. 1.4 ✓ scope.clientIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 ✓ scope.strategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty scope → unfiltered data. 1.7 ⚠ MOCK_STRATEGIES re-exported through context from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data — these strategy archetypes are reference data and should move to lib/constants/risk. The widget uses MOCK_STRATEGIES for strategy filter dropdown labels — functional but reference data location is wrong.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (real-time exposure), paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only analysis widget.

3.2.note: isBatchMode available in context; not used by this widget (pure display).

3.5.note: Paper mode: same exposure table with paper account positions.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: Strategy filter Select calls setRiskFilterStrategy. Period buttons (1W/1M/3M) call setExposurePeriod. Both are real handlers.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.4 (strategy filter changes table rows), 4.7 (CollapsibleSection toggles work), 4.8 (WidgetScroll contains content).

5.1.note: Target strategies: defi-basis-trade, defi-amm-lp, defi-lending-borrowing, cefi-stat-arb, and all others. MOCK_STRATEGIES used in filter dropdown.

7.1.note: #3b82f6 on delta line and #22c55e on funding line replaced with var(--chart-3) and var(--chart-2).

7.2.note: Widget imports MOCK_STRATEGIES from ./risk-data-context, which re-exports from @/lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data. This is a L1.7 carry-over — mock data flows through context layer. Widget itself does not import lib/mocks directly.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: slicedTimeSeries computed inline but depends only on stable context values and exposurePeriod state.

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed. MOCK_STRATEGIES import from context layer (not lib/mocks directly) — logged as known issue.

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[11px] replaced with text-micro/text-caption tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.2.note: No bracket spacing violations. w-[200px] SelectTrigger is a fixed width, not spacing.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Select, Table, CollapsibleSection from ui/shared.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=6, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Grouped exposure table with 5 risk categories; no equivalent widget in domain.

relationships.notes: Strategy filter is widget-local state. Time series shows top-3 exposure types.

dataContract.notes: exposureRows, groupedExposure, exposureTimeSeries all computed in use-risk-page-data.ts context.

gaps: MOCK_STRATEGIES in filter dropdown — strategy list should be API-sourced
coverage.notes: 5 exposure categories: first_order, second_order, structural, operational, domain_specific.

knownIssues: 1.7: MOCK_STRATEGIES (strategy archetype reference data) travels through lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data → context re-export → widget. Should be in lib/constants/risk instead. Affects strategy filter dropdown labels.

findings.description: 0.6 fix: added isLoading spinner early-return (was missing)
0.8 fix: added hasError early-return block (was missing)
risk-exposure-attribution-widget.tsx:172 — stroke='#3b82f6' on delta line; :176 — stroke='#22c55e' on funding line
findings.fix: Replaced with var(--chart-3) and var(--chart-2) respectively

findings.description: risk-exposure-attribution-widget.tsx — ~30 user-visible strings (category headers, column headers, period buttons, strategy names)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-exposure-attribution-widget.tsx — text-[10px], text-[11px] used throughout for dense table/label sizing
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed
